_description: TMSL (Tabular Model Scripting Language) script to deploy all 41 FIP DAX measures to the FIP_Main dataset via the Power BI Premium XMLA endpoint. Execute via deploy_xmla.py or paste into SQL Server Management Studio connected to the XMLA endpoint.

table.name: _Measures
table.description: Calculated table containing all FIP DAX measures. Not a data table — all measures reference gold/silver fact and dimension tables via CALCULATE and filter context.

measures.name: Revenue
measures.description: Net sales revenue in local currency (HUF). HU GAAP 2000/C Act §72.

measures.name: COGS
measures.description: Cost of goods sold / cost of sales (Eladott áruk beszerzési értéke).

measures.name: Gross Profit
measures.description: Revenue minus cost of goods sold.

measures.name: Gross Margin %
measures.description: Gross profit as a percentage of revenue. BLANK when no revenue.

measures.name: Personnel Expense
measures.description: Total personnel cost including wages, social contributions and other charges.

measures.name: Other OpEx
measures.description: Other operating expenses excluding personnel and COGS.
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    SUMX(
        gold_fact_gl_transaction,
        gold_fact_gl_transaction[net_amount_lcy]
    ),
    gold_fact_gl_transaction[pl_line_item] = "Other OpEx"
)

measures.name: Other Operating Income
measures.description: Other operating income per HU GAAP 2000/C Act §77 (subsidies, insurance proceeds, etc.).
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    SUMX(
        gold_fact_gl_transaction,
        gold_fact_gl_transaction[net_amount_lcy]
    ),
    gold_fact_gl_transaction[pl_line_item] = "Other Operating Income"
)

measures.name: EBITDA
measures.description: Earnings Before Interest, Tax, Depreciation and Amortisation. HU GAAP accrual basis.
measures.expression:
VAR gross_profit = [Gross Profit]
VAR other_oi     = [Other Operating Income]
VAR personnel    = [Personnel Expense]
VAR other_opex   = [Other OpEx]
RETURN
    gross_profit + other_oi - personnel - other_opex

measures.name: EBITDA Margin %
measures.description: EBITDA as a percentage of revenue. Denominator is revenue only (HU GAAP convention).

measures.name: Net Profit
measures.description: Net profit after all P&L items (Mérleg szerinti eredmény). Follows HU GAAP income statement identity (2000/C Act Appendix 2).
measures.expression:
VAR revenue     = [Revenue]
VAR other_oi    = [Other Operating Income]
VAR cogs        = [COGS]
VAR personnel   = [Personnel Expense]
VAR other_opex  = [Other OpEx]
VAR fin_income  = CALCULATE(
                      SUMX(gold_fact_gl_transaction, gold_fact_gl_transaction[net_amount_lcy]),
                      gold_fact_gl_transaction[pl_line_item] = "Financial Income"
                  )
VAR fin_expense = CALCULATE(
                      SUMX(gold_fact_gl_transaction, gold_fact_gl_transaction[net_amount_lcy]),
                      gold_fact_gl_transaction[pl_line_item] = "Financial Expense"
                  )
VAR tax_expense = CALCULATE(
                      SUMX(gold_fact_gl_transaction, gold_fact_gl_transaction[net_amount_lcy]),
                      gold_fact_gl_transaction[pl_line_item] = "Tax Expense"
                  )
RETURN
    revenue + other_oi - cogs - personnel - other_opex + fin_income - fin_expense - tax_expense

measures.name: Total Current Assets
measures.description: Forgóeszközök total — inventories, trade receivables, short-term investments, cash.

measures.name: Total Non-Current Assets
measures.description: Befektetett eszközök — intangibles, property, plant and equipment, long-term financial assets.

measures.name: Total Assets
measures.description: Sum of current and non-current assets. Must equal Total Liabilities + Total Equity.

measures.name: Total Current Liabilities
measures.description: Rövid lejáratú kötelezettségek — short-term liabilities due within 12 months.

measures.name: Total Non-Current Liabilities
measures.description: Hosszú lejáratú kötelezettségek — bank loans, bonds, long-term leasing obligations.

measures.name: Total Liabilities
measures.description: Total liabilities (current + non-current).

measures.name: Total Equity
measures.description: Shareholders' equity (Saját tőke) per HU GAAP 2000/C Act §35-§39.

measures.name: Debt to Equity
measures.description: Debt-to-equity ratio (Tőkeáttételi mutató). Total Liabilities ÷ Total Equity. BLANK when equity is zero.

measures.name: Operating Cash Flow
measures.description: Net cash from operating activities (indirect method). Includes EBITDA ± working capital changes.

measures.name: Capex
measures.description: Capital expenditure — purchase of fixed assets. Stored as negative cash outflow.

measures.name: Investing Cash Flow
measures.description: Total net cash from investing activities including Capex, asset disposals, and acquisitions.

measures.name: Financing Cash Flow
measures.description: Cash from financing activities: borrowings, repayments, equity issuance, dividends paid.

measures.name: Free Cash Flow
measures.description: Free Cash Flow = Operating Cash Flow − Capex. Measures cash generation capacity.
measures.expression:
VAR operating_cf = [Operating Cash Flow]
VAR capex        = [Capex]
RETURN
    operating_cf + capex

measures.name: Working Capital
measures.description: Net current assets (Forgóeszközök − Rövid lejáratú kötelezettségek). Positive = liquid.

measures.name: Current Ratio
measures.description: Liquidity ratio (Likviditási mutató). Target ≥ 1.5. Below 1.0 signals insolvency risk.
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Total Current Assets],
    [Total Current Liabilities],
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: Days Sales Outstanding
measures.description: Average debtor collection period in days (Vevőkövetelések behajtási ideje). Target < 45 days.
measures.expression:
VAR accounts_receivable =
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(gold_agg_balance_sheet[balance_amount_lcy]),
        gold_agg_balance_sheet[bs_subcategory] = "Trade Receivables"
    )
VAR revenue_last_3m =
    CALCULATE(
        [Revenue],
        DATESINPERIOD(
            silver_dim_date[calendar_date],
            LASTDATE(silver_dim_date[calendar_date]),
            -3,
            MONTH
        )
    )
VAR daily_revenue = DIVIDE(revenue_last_3m, 90, BLANK())
RETURN
    DIVIDE(accounts_receivable, daily_revenue, BLANK())

measures.name: Days Payable Outstanding
measures.description: Average creditor payment period in days (Szállítói fizetési idő). Target 30-60 days.
measures.expression:
VAR accounts_payable =
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(gold_agg_balance_sheet[balance_amount_lcy]),
        gold_agg_balance_sheet[bs_subcategory] = "Trade Payables"
    )
VAR cogs_last_3m =
    CALCULATE(
        [COGS],
        DATESINPERIOD(
            silver_dim_date[calendar_date],
            LASTDATE(silver_dim_date[calendar_date]),
            -3,
            MONTH
        )
    )
VAR daily_cogs = DIVIDE(cogs_last_3m, 90, BLANK())
RETURN
    DIVIDE(accounts_payable, daily_cogs, BLANK())

measures.name: Revenue Budget
measures.description: Approved monthly revenue budget from budget.fact_budget. BLANK if no budget loaded for period.

measures.name: Revenue Variance
measures.description: Revenue variance (actual minus budget). Positive = favourable. Negative = adverse.

measures.name: Revenue Variance %
measures.description: Revenue variance as a percentage of budget. BLANK when no budget. Positive = favourable.

measures.name: EBITDA Variance
measures.description: EBITDA variance (actual minus budget). BLANK if EBITDA budget not loaded for selected period.
measures.expression:
VAR ebitda_actual = [EBITDA]
VAR ebitda_budget =
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(agg_pl_monthly[ebitda_budget]),
        NOT ISBLANK(agg_pl_monthly[ebitda_budget])
    )
RETURN
    IF(
        ISBLANK(ebitda_budget),
        BLANK(),
        ebitda_actual - ebitda_budget
    )

measures.name: Revenue RAG
measures.description: Traffic-light status for revenue vs budget. GREEN ≥ 0%, AMBER -5% to 0%, RED < -5%.
measures.expression:
VAR variance_pct = [Revenue Variance %]
RETURN
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        ISBLANK(variance_pct), "GREY",
        variance_pct >= 0.00,  "GREEN",
        variance_pct >= -0.05, "AMBER",
        "RED"
    )

measures.name: EBITDA RAG
measures.description: Traffic-light status for EBITDA vs budget. GREEN ≥ 0%, AMBER -5% to 0%, RED < -5%.
measures.expression:
VAR actual  = [EBITDA]
VAR budget  = CALCULATE(SUM(agg_pl_monthly[ebitda_budget]), NOT ISBLANK(agg_pl_monthly[ebitda_budget]))
VAR pct_var = DIVIDE(actual - budget, ABS(budget), BLANK())
RETURN
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        ISBLANK(pct_var), "GREY",
        pct_var >= 0.00,  "GREEN",
        pct_var >= -0.05, "AMBER",
        "RED"
    )

measures.name: DQ Pass Rate %
measures.description: Percentage of DQ rule checks that passed. Target ≥ 99%. Controller dashboard gauge.
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(
        COUNTROWS(audit_data_quality_log),
        audit_data_quality_log[check_result] = "PASS"
    ),
    COUNTROWS(audit_data_quality_log),
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: Open Quarantine Count
measures.description: Count of unresolved quarantine records. Target = 0 at period close.

measures.name: Open Critical Alerts
measures.description: Count of open critical platform alerts. Drives the alert badge on the CEO dashboard.

measures.name: Revenue YTD
measures.description: Year-to-date cumulative revenue from January 1 of the selected fiscal year.

measures.name: Revenue PY
measures.description: Revenue for the same calendar period one year prior. Used in YoY variance calculations.

measures.name: Revenue YoY %
measures.description: Revenue growth rate year-over-year. BLANK if prior year data unavailable.
measures.expression:
VAR current = [Revenue]
VAR prior   = [Revenue PY]
RETURN
    DIVIDE(
        current - prior,
        ABS(prior),
        BLANK()
    )

measures.name: EBITDA YTD
measures.description: Year-to-date EBITDA. Used in YTD budget variance analysis on CFO dashboard.

measures.name: Net Profit YTD
measures.description: Year-to-date net profit (Mérleg szerinti eredmény YTD).
